title: oncoba ovata
intro: Oncoba ovata, also known as the astrid tree or the siren tree, is a deciduous tree species native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Oncoba ovata lie in its bark, which is rich in flavonoids and has been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Oncoba ovata include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat infections. In herbal preparations, the bark of Oncoba ovata is often used to make teas, decoctions, or infusions, and is also used in the form of powder or capsules to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
